title: Better Grates
description: This pack aims to overhaul copper grates, giving them a unique, clean texture of their own!
body:
This pack aims to give copper grates their own unique, clean textures!

-=IMPORTANT=-
IF YOU WANT TO USE THIS PACK WITH [Enhanced Copper](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/becks-better-copper), USE THE DEDICATED COMPATIBILITY VERSION INCLUDED IN THE DOWNLOADS!!!


This pack SHOULD work on all versions going forward and will be updated if necessary
